headerDisplay: Controls Somfy RTS roller shutters through an RFXtrx433E dongle. Position (%) is simulated by timing up/down commands, so calibrate openDurationSeconds/closeDurationSeconds carefully for each shutter.

tty.title: RFXCOM serial port
tty.description: Run `ls /dev/cu.*` after plugging the RFXCOM in to find the exact path. With the RFX-433EMC it may show up as /dev/cu.usbserial-0001, /dev/cu.SLAB_USBtoUART, /dev/cu.wchusbserial* or /dev/cu.usbmodem* depending on the USB chip.

deviceId.title: RFY device id
deviceId.description: Format 0xAABBCC/unitCode. Must be a code you paired with the shutter's motor beforehand (see scripts/pair.js).

reversed.title: Reversed
reversed.description: Enable if 'up' closes the shutter instead of opening it.

openDurationSeconds.title: Full open duration (seconds)
openDurationSeconds.description: Time for a full opening run, closed (0%) to open (100%) — measured on the shutter itself, regardless of which RF command triggers it.

closeDurationSeconds.title: Full close duration (seconds)
closeDurationSeconds.description: Time for a full closing run, open (100%) to closed (0%) — measured on the shutter itself, regardless of which RF command triggers it.

forceCloseAtStartup.title: Force close at Homebridge startup
forceCloseAtStartup.description: Sends a full close whenever Homebridge (re)starts, to keep the simulated position accurate over time.

members.title: Group members (deviceIds)
members.description: For a group remote paired on several motors: deviceIds of the member shutters. Their simulated positions follow every group command (no extra RF), and this accessory shows the average of its members.
